zh.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan是Otto de Bodrugan和Margaret Champernon的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾。他於大約1354年與Joane Trelausard結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1380年被列為sheriff of cornwall。他去世於1389年9月3日在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan是Otto de Bodrugan和Margaret Champernon的儿子，出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾。他于大约1354年与Joane Trelausard结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1380年被列为sheriff of cornwall。他去世于1389年9月3日在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan was born in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom as the son of Otto de Bodrugan and Margaret Champernon. He married Joane Trelausard about 1354. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1380, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cornwall. He died on 3 September 1389, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan est né à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Otto de Bodrugan et Margaret Champernon. Il a épousé Joane Trelausard environ 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1380, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cornwall. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1389, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan wurde in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Otto de Bodrugan und Margaret Champernon geboren. Er hat um 1354 Joane Trelausard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1380 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of cornwall aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. September 1389 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan è nato il nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Otto de Bodrugan e Margaret Champernon. Lui sposato Joane Trelausard circa 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1380, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cornwall. Morì il 3 settembre 1389, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto BodruganはイギリスイギリスコルンワルでOtto de BodruganとMargaret Champernonの息子として生まれた。約1354年にJoane Trelausardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1380年，職業はsheriff of cornwallと記録されている。彼は1389年9月3日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Otto de Bodrugan(와)과 Margaret Champernon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1354년 Joane Trelausard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1380년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of cornwall이었다. 그는 1389년 9월 3일 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Ilfracombe, Barnstaple, Devon, England: Ilfracombe, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan nasceu em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Otto de Bodrugan e Margaret Champernon. Ele casou-se com Joane Trelausard aproximadamente 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1380, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cornwall. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1389, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan родился в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Otto de Bodrugan и Margaret Champernon. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Trelausard около 1354 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1380 году он работал по профессии sheriff of cornwall. Он умер 3 сентября 1389 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Otto Bodrugan nació en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Otto de Bodrugan y Margaret Champernon. Se casó con Joane Trelausard aproximadamente 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1380, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cornwall. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1389, en su pueblo.
